name: Tri Love Bracelet
details:
Product Description

Celebrate love in all its forms with the Tri Love Bracelet—a thoughtfully designed set of three crystal bracelets that represents self-love, emotional harmony and peaceful connection.

The trio brings together soft Rose Quartz beads, calming white Howlite, soothing purple Amethyst and polished silver-toned accents. One bracelet is finished with a detailed owl charm, adding a symbolic touch of wisdom, awareness and thoughtful love.

Wear all three together for a layered crystal statement or style them separately according to your mood. With their soft colours, delicate faceted beads and flexible slip-on construction, these bracelets fit naturally into everyday, festive and gifting looks.

Why Choose It?

Three Bracelets in One Set:
Includes three coordinated crystal bracelets that can be worn together, individually or shared with someone special.

Love-Inspired Crystal Combination:
Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst create a soft combination associated with love, calmness and emotional balance.

Meaningful Owl Charm:
The silver-toned owl charm adds character and traditionally represents wisdom, intuition and awareness.

Soft and Elegant Colour Palette:
The combination of pale pink, white, purple and silver tones gives the set a clean and graceful appearance.

Flexible Slip-On Design:
Each bracelet features a stretch-style construction for convenient everyday wear.

Key Highlights
Set of three coordinated bracelets
Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst beads
Detailed silver-toned owl charm
Polished silver-toned spacer beads
Soft pink, white and purple colour palette
Flexible stretch-style construction
Wear together or separately
Suitable for everyday styling and gifting
Crafted With
Rose Quartz Beads

The soft pink Rose Quartz beads form the main foundation of the trio. Rose Quartz is traditionally associated with unconditional love, self-acceptance, compassion and emotional harmony. Studd Muffyn’s existing Rose Quartz range also positions the crystal around love, calmness and emotional balance.

Howlite Beads

White Howlite beads feature delicate grey marbling that gives every bracelet a naturally distinctive appearance. Howlite is traditionally associated with patience, relaxation and a steady mindset.

Amethyst Beads

Purple Amethyst accents add depth and a gentle pop of colour. Amethyst is traditionally linked with inner peace, clarity, relaxation and emotional balance.

Silver-Toned Owl Charm

The detailed owl charm creates the central highlight of one bracelet and represents wisdom, observation and thoughtful decision-making.

Metallic Spacer Beads

Smooth silver-toned spacers add shine, separation and balance to the crystal arrangements.

Flexible Stretch Cord

The durable elastic construction helps the bracelets slide easily onto the wrist without requiring a clasp.

Crystal Significance
Rose Quartz — Love and Emotional Warmth

Rose Quartz is traditionally known as the crystal of love. It is associated with self-love, compassion, emotional comfort and harmony in relationships.

Howlite — Calmness and Patience

Howlite is commonly connected with relaxation, patience and a peaceful mindset. It may be worn as a symbolic reminder to slow down and respond thoughtfully.

Amethyst — Peace and Clarity

Amethyst is traditionally associated with calmness, mental clarity and emotional balance. Its soothing purple appearance gives the trio a graceful and meaningful finish.

Together, these three crystals represent a softer kind of strength—loving yourself, staying emotionally balanced and approaching relationships with calmness and understanding.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims.
